-- 2 of 28 --

So here’s what everyone here needs to do:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 28 --

So here’s what everyone here needs to do:
1) Prioritize your problems (rate 1-5 on 5 core
functions)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 28 --

So here’s what everyone here needs to do:
1) Prioritize your problems (rate 1-5 on 5 core functions)
2) Prioritize your notes according to the problems
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 28 --

So here’s what everyone here needs to do:
1) Prioritize your problems (rate 1-5 on 5 core functions)
2) Prioritize your notes according to the problems
3) Create Actions Items for each
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 28 --

So here’s what everyone here needs to do:
1) Prioritize your problems (rate 1-5 on 5 core functions)
2) Prioritize your notes according to the problems
3) Create Actions Items for each
4) Circle top 3 big items
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 28 --

So here’s what everyone here needs to do:
1) Prioritize your problems (rate 1-5 on 5 core functions)
2) Prioritize your notes according to the problems
3) Create Actions Items for each
4) Circle top 3 big items
5) Put them on your calendar
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 28 --

So here’s what everyone here needs to do:
1) Prioritize your problems (rate 1-5 on 5 core functions)
2) Prioritize your notes according to the problems
3) Create Actions Items for each
4) Circle top 3 big items
5) Put them on your calendar
6) Give yourself permission to ignore the rest until
the first are successfully implemented
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 28 --

So here’s what everyone here needs to do:
And if you want extra credit for being awesome…
...selfishly, I’d ask you to read the book.
And if you are “busy” just read section 2 & 3, because
that’s what 90% of you need.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
